Localization.Description: Assignment of objects of a Dr.Web antivirus network

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An antivirus network object of the "{object.type}" type is assigned to an object of the "{object.property}" type on host {event_src.host}
An antivirus network object of the "{object.type}" type is unassigned from an object of the "{object.property}" type on host {event_src.host}
Failed to assign an antivirus network object of the "{object.type}" type to an object of the "{object.property}" type on host {event_src.host}
Failed to unassign an antivirus network object of the "{object.type}" type from an object of the "{object.property}" type on host {event_src.host}
